actions.narration: Okay, tasks page. Let's see what this thing is all about. Already logged in? Survey Corps? What is this, Attack on Titan fan fiction?
Register? Nope, already logged in apparently. Guess I'll skip right to the tasks then. Website should've checked that and redirected me to the log out screen.
Mission Dashboard? Where is this mythical dashboard? I don't see anything labeled 'Mission Dashboard'.
Calendar View, Dashboard... wait, 'Dashboard'? That's a tab up top? Why isn't it more prominent? Should be the default view after login, not buried. UI fail number one.
Okay, *now* I see some tasks. Filters, Categories, Priorities, Deadline, Status... standard fare. 'Loading tasks...' Seriously? Still loading? How many tasks do they have, the entire backlog of Jira?

friction_points: No clear 'Mission Dashboard' link or immediately obvious entry point.
Tasks page shows logged in state but tasks require another click.
